sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96801" key="stikto/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στικτόπους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ουν</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n96801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with spotted feet</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔλαφοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:307" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.307</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
